PROFILE IMAGE SETUP

1. Replace muhammad-husnain-profile.svg with your real portrait.
2. Recommended file: muhammad-husnain-profile.webp
3. Recommended source size: 1400 x 1800 px, portrait orientation.
4. Keep the face centered with comfortable space above the head.
5. Update src/content/site.json:
   "profileImage": "/profile/muhammad-husnain-profile.webp"

The website automatically crops the image responsively and falls back to the included placeholder if the file cannot load.
